name: tdd-guard PreToolUse on commit refuses when implementation regressed a previously-green active spec
command: mkdir -p repo && (cd repo && git init -q) && printf '{"feature_id":"feat-x","red_tests":[],"regressions":["previously-green-spec-1"]}\n' > tdd-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/tdd-guard.sh" --root repo --feature-id feat-x --tdd-state tdd-state.json 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'commit_blocked' err.txt && grep -q 'regression=previously-green-spec-1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
